hero_image_prompt: Lush green forest with soft sunlight filtering through trees, representing hope and environmental preservation. Wide landscape view showing dense, healthy forest ecosystem.

hero.headline: GreenFuture: Protecting Our Planet for Generations
hero.subheadline: We're committed to sustainable environmental solutions through reforestation, ocean conservation, and youth education.

about.title: Our Mission
about.description: GreenFuture is dedicated to reversing environmental damage and creating sustainable pathways for our planet's future. We believe in collective action, innovative solutions, and empowering communities to become environmental stewards.

program_images.reforestation_prompt: Volunteers planting young trees in a cleared area, showing teamwork and environmental restoration
program_images.oceans_prompt: Beach cleanup with volunteers collecting plastic waste, showing environmental conservation in action
program_images.education_prompt: Diverse group of students learning about ecology in an outdoor classroom setting

programs.title: Reforestation
programs.description: We plant trees in deforested regions, focusing on native species that restore biodiversity and combat climate change. Each tree represents hope for our planet's future.

programs.title: Clean Oceans
programs.description: Our ocean conservation efforts include beach cleanups, plastic reduction campaigns, and supporting marine ecosystem restoration projects worldwide.

programs.title: Youth Education
programs.description: We develop environmental education programs for schools, teaching young people about sustainability, conservation, and their role in protecting our planet.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Join our community and receive the latest updates on our environmental initiatives.
